name: NYC Subway Arrivals
description: Live upcoming train arrivals for a chosen NYC subway station, like the station countdown clocks.
author: Alexander Ananiadis

station.title: Station
station.description: Subway station name (e.g. "Times Sq-42 St"). A GTFS stop id also works. If a name is shared by several stations, qualify it with routes, e.g. "86 St (1)".

direction.title: Direction
direction.description: Which direction(s) of travel to show.

routes.title: Route Filter
routes.description: Optional comma-separated routes to show (e.g. "1,2,3"). Leave blank for all routes serving the station.

max_arrivals.title: Arrivals Per Line
max_arrivals.description: How many upcoming trains to list per route and direction.

refresh_seconds.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
refresh_seconds.description: How often to fetch new arrival data.

env_vars.name: NYC_SUBWAY_STATION
env_vars.description: Station name or GTFS stop id (can also be set in UI)

env_vars.name: NYC_SUBWAY_DIRECTION
env_vars.description: Direction filter: both, north, or south (can also be set in UI)

formatted.description: Next train as a one-line summary

arrival_count.description: Total number of upcoming arrivals returned

updated_at.description: Local time the data was last refreshed

eta.description: Color arrivals by minutes away (e.g. red when imminent)

screenshots.alt: NYC Subway Arrivals displayed on a Vestaboard
screenshots.caption: Upcoming arrivals for Times Sq-42 St
